ques: Identify the upgrade options available for the cheapest base model of the MacBook Pro 14-inch with M3 chip, and calculate the total price difference from the base model to the maximum upgrade (no Pre-Installed Software) offered by Apple.
answer: The M3 MacBook Pro 14-inch is now discontinued on Apple's live site (only M5/M5 Pro/M5 Max are sold). For the M3 14-inch base model ($1,599: 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD), the upgrade options were memory (16GB +$200, 24GB +$400) and storage (1TB +$200, 2TB +$600). Maximum upgrade excluding pre-installed software = 24GB + 2TB = $2,599, a total price difference of $1,000.
